data.content:
Implementation Plan:
1. Add -v/--verbose flag to ShowArgs and ClaimArgs in cli.rs
2. Modify ui.rs knot_show_fields to show latest note/handoff_capsule content instead of just counts, with hidden-count hint
3. Add print_knot_show_verbose variant or pass verbose param
4. Modify prompt.rs render_prompt/render_prompt_json to accept verbose flag, showing only latest note/handoff_capsule by default
5. Thread verbose through main.rs, poll_claim.rs, write_dispatch.rs
6. For JSON output, add 'other' field with suggestion text when items are hidden
7. Add tests for all new behavior paths

Files to modify: cli.rs, ui.rs, prompt.rs, main.rs, poll_claim.rs, write_dispatch.rs, write_queue.rs
